text: I feel a sense of unease and curiosity in this dark, quiet space. The absence of people amplifies the mechanical hum and echoes of my own movement. Surrounded by glass, screens, and symbols of knowledge—'R+D'—I am reminded of humanity’s striving for understanding. Yet in this dimness, the promise of discovery feels both inviting and slightly haunting, as if I’ve stumbled into a liminal place between waking and dreaming.
